mapper.sql: id, supplier_id, case_no, order_no, type, description, status, remaining_hours, opinion, solution, attachments, review_status, remark, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO supplier_aftersale_cases (supplier_id, case_no, order_no, type, description, status, remaining_hours, opinion, solution, attachments, review_status, remark, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{supplierId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{caseNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remainingHours, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{opinion, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{solution, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attachments, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reviewStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

INSERT INTO supplier_aftersale_cases (supplier_id, case_no, order_no, type, description, status, remaining_hours, opinion, solution, attachments, review_status, remark, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{item.supplierId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.caseNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.orderNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.remainingHours, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.opinion, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.solution, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attachments, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.reviewStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM supplier_aftersale_cases WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status != 'deleted'
SELECT FROM supplier_aftersale_cases WHERE id IN #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status != 'deleted'
mapper.update: UPDATE supplier_aftersale_cases SET status = 'deleted' WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
UPDATE supplier_aftersale_cases SET status = 'deleted' WHERE id IN #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM supplier_aftersale_cases WHERE case_no = #{caseNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND status != 'deleted' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
